news.title: Goldman Sachs Bank Europe SE bought 971,374 shares of Afcons at avg price of ₹276.5.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs Bank Europe SE bought 971,374 shares of Afcons at avg price of ₹276.5.

news.title:
Afcons Infra's EPC contract worth $113.03M, 93.5% complete, is terminated.
VIP Industries faces a tax search and seizure operation in Nashik, Maharashtra.
news.summary:
Afcons Infra's EPC contract worth $113.03M, 93.5% complete, is terminated.
VIP Industries faces a tax search and seizure operation in Nashik, Maharashtra.

news.title:
Afcons Infrastructure shares fell 3.6% to ₹296.9 after a €113M contract termination by SAG.
Afcons stated the termination won't impact its order book, operations, or business outlook.
news.summary:
Afcons Infrastructure shares fell 3.6% to ₹296.9 after a €113M contract termination by SAG.
Afcons stated the termination won't impact its order book, operations, or business outlook.

news.title: Afcons Infrastructure's EUR 113.03M Nr1 Road EPC contract terminated despite 93% completion.
news.summary: Afcons Infrastructure's EUR 113.03M Nr1 Road EPC contract terminated despite 93% completion.

news.title:
Afcons Infrastructure Ltd applied for reclassification of entities from Promoter Group to Public Category under SEBI regulations.
The application lists 29 entities with no shareholding in the company, including Shapoorji Pallonji Housing Infra.
news.summary:
Afcons Infrastructure Ltd applied for reclassification of entities from Promoter Group to Public Category under SEBI regulations.
The application lists 29 entities with no shareholding in the company, including Shapoorji Pallonji Housing Infra.

news.title:
Afcons Infrastructure reports sequential declines in net sales and profit, indicating challenges.
Financial metrics highlight difficulties in sustaining profitability and growth amidst cost pressures.
news.summary:
Afcons Infrastructure reports sequential declines in net sales and profit, indicating challenges.
Financial metrics highlight difficulties in sustaining profitability and growth amidst cost pressures.

news.title:
Afcons Infrastructure raised ₹50 crore via NCDs on Oct 14, 2025.
Entire ₹50 crore utilized by Dec 31, 2025, with no deviations or approvals needed.
news.summary:
Afcons Infrastructure raised ₹50 crore via NCDs on Oct 14, 2025.
Entire ₹50 crore utilized by Dec 31, 2025, with no deviations or approvals needed.

news.title:
Afcons Infrastructure's 9M FY26 total income dipped 0.9% YoY to ₹9,545 Cr, EBITDA rose 1.8% excluding ₹77 Cr one-time impact.
PAT declined 9.7% YoY due to one-time labour provisions; order book strong at ₹31,543 Cr ensuring revenue visibility.
news.summary:
Afcons Infrastructure's 9M FY26 total income dipped 0.9% YoY to ₹9,545 Cr, EBITDA rose 1.8% excluding ₹77 Cr one-time impact.
PAT declined 9.7% YoY due to one-time labour provisions; order book strong at ₹31,543 Cr ensuring revenue visibility.

news.title:
Afcons Infrastructure's board meeting on Feb 10, 2026, will review unaudited standalone and consolidated results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
Trading window for Afcons Infrastructure securities remains closed from Jan 1, 2026, until 48 hours post-results disclosure.
news.summary:
Afcons Infrastructure's board meeting on Feb 10, 2026, will review unaudited standalone and consolidated results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
Trading window for Afcons Infrastructure securities remains closed from Jan 1, 2026, until 48 hours post-results disclosure.

news.title:
Afcons Infrastructure faces EUR 17.85M surety bond invocation on Gabon contract.
93.5% work done; arbitration initiated due to payment certification dispute.
news.summary:
Afcons Infrastructure faces EUR 17.85M surety bond invocation on Gabon contract.
93.5% work done; arbitration initiated due to payment certification dispute.

news.title:
AFCONS Infrastructure wins arbitration award of ₹270.3M, enhancing finances.
It also secures a bank guarantee worth ₹275.4M, boosting stability.
news.summary:
AFCONS Infrastructure wins arbitration award of ₹270.3M, enhancing finances.
It also secures a bank guarantee worth ₹275.4M, boosting stability.

news.title:
Afcons received Rs 27.03 Cr cash and Rs 27.54 Cr bank guarantee return from arbitration with IRCON.
The arbitration award, announced on Jan 29, 2026, is expected to positively impact Afcons' financials.
news.summary:
Afcons received Rs 27.03 Cr cash and Rs 27.54 Cr bank guarantee return from arbitration with IRCON.
The arbitration award, announced on Jan 29, 2026, is expected to positively impact Afcons' financials.

news.title:
Afcons Infrastructure certifies intended use of Commercial Paper proceeds for Q4 2025.
The company confirms adherence to listing conditions, CFO signed confirmation on Jan 19, 2026.
news.summary:
Afcons Infrastructure certifies intended use of Commercial Paper proceeds for Q4 2025.

news.title: AFCONS Infra issues commercial papers worth 500M INR to bolster capital base.
news.summary: AFCONS Infra issues commercial papers worth 500M INR to bolster capital base.

news.title:
Afcons Infrastructure issued Rs. 50 Cr Commercial Papers on Jan 13, 2026, with 8% coupon rate.
The CPs are unsecured, rated Crisil A1, and will mature on Jan 13, 2027.
news.summary:
Afcons Infrastructure issued Rs. 50 Cr Commercial Papers on Jan 13, 2026, with 8% coupon rate.
The CPs are unsecured, rated Crisil A1, and will mature on Jan 13, 2027.

news.title:
Axis Trustee Services disclosed encumbrance over 9.21 crore shares (25.03%) of Afcons Infrastructure under SEBI SAST regulations.
The pledge benefits debenture holders of GIPL and Capespan Debentures, with Axis Trustee acting as Common Security Trustee.
news.summary:
Axis Trustee Services disclosed encumbrance over 9.21 crore shares (25.03%) of Afcons Infrastructure under SEBI SAST regulations.
The pledge benefits debenture holders of GIPL and Capespan Debentures, with Axis Trustee acting as Common Security Trustee.

news.title:
Afcons Infrastructure Ltd schedules investor meetings with Nippon Mutual Fund and PhillipCapital on Dec 16-17, 2025 in Mumbai.
No unpublished price-sensitive information will be disclosed during these meetings.
news.summary:
Afcons Infrastructure Ltd schedules investor meetings with Nippon Mutual Fund and PhillipCapital on Dec 16-17, 2025 in Mumbai.

The award is anticipated to positively impact Afcons' financial standing.

Afcons Infrastructure schedules investor/analyst meets on Dec 11 & 16, 2025.
Meetings with IIFL Capital & Nirmal Bang will be one-on-one; no price-sensitive info shared.
